abi_tile: args [Q ptr, CACHE ptr, part f32 ptr, meta f32 ptr] + scalar start_pos (baked S, scale, n_valid=start_pos+1); grid (Hkv,S,1) block (128,1,1); ins=(0,1) outs=(2,3)
abi_combine: args [part, meta, out] ; grid (Hq,1,1) block (32,1,1); ins=(0,1) outs=(2,)
dtype_contract: fp16 cache (FO2) / fp16 Q,K,V / fp32 part,meta,out accumulation (flash online-softmax m,l + fp32 partials)
memory_layout: WHOLE cache_kv buffer [2,1,Hkv,MAXC,Hd] flat; K half kbase=CACHE+kvh*MAXC*Hd (offset 0); V half vbase=CACHE+(Hkv+kvh)*MAXC*Hd; Hkv=8 baked; per-position stride Hd, per-kvhead stride MAXC*Hd
work_decomposition: split-KV across S workgroups in y (S=48 default); Hkv workgroups in x; 128 threads = 4 warps(wave32); warp->q-head in GQA group (G=4); lane cooperatively stages TK=16 positions to LDS; cross-lane __shfl_xor reduce over 32 lanes
primitives: v_dot2 (__builtin_amdgcn_fdot2) for QK; __shfl_xor cross-lane reduce; LDS K/V staging; fp16 vector global loads
